entities.name: CAJANUS CAJAN
entities.description: A species of legume used in the creation of hybrids with Atylosia species

entities.name: ATYLOSIA LINEATA
entities.description: A species used to create hybrids with Cajanus cajan

entities.name: ATYLOSIA SERICEA
entities.description: A species used to create hybrids with Cajanus cajan

entities.name: ATYLOSIA SCARABAEOIDES
entities.description: A species used to create hybrids with Cajanus cajan

entities.name: CAJANUS X ATYLOSIA HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids formed between Cajanus cajan and various Atylosia species

entities.name: CENTROMERES
entities.description: The primary constriction of a chromosome, which fuse to form star-shaped configurations in the studied hybrids

entities.name: BIVALENTS
entities.description: Pairs of homologous chromosomes that fuse to form star-shaped configurations

entities.name: STAR-SHAPED CONFIGURATIONS
entities.description: Cytogenetic configurations formed by the fusion of centromeres of different bivalents at the pachytene stage

entities.name: PACHYTENE
entities.description: A stage of prophase I in meiosis where star-shaped configurations are observed

entities.name: DIAKINESIS
entities.description: A stage of meiosis where bivalent associations are observed

entities.name: METAPHASE-I
entities.description: A stage of meiosis where bivalent associations are observed

entities.name: RECIPROCAL TRANSLOCATIONS
entities.description: A type of chromosomal rearrangement that may cause the formation of star-shaped configurations

entities.name: SECONDARY ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Chromosome associations for which star-shaped configurations at pachytene are forerunners

entities.name: BIVALENT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Associations of bivalents observed during diakinesis and metaphase I

relationships.description: may be the result of reciprocal translocations
